turns.user_message: I've been noticing I get this tight feeling in my chest for no real reason. It's been happening on and off for a few weeks now.
That tightness comes more often now and my heart starts pounding out of nowhere. I feel on edge even when I'm just sitting at home.
I'm constantly braced for that wave of panic to hit me and it's exhausting. It feels like I'm losing control over my own body.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something they noticed about themselves. This has been going on for a while.
